meaning: n.(印度教)(能见伟人一面而)有德,沾光,增禄,得福
examples: I wrote to Baba that I wanted to go to Ahmednagar to have His darshan.
Before the 21 days processes started in 2004, Western devotees came to Golden City for so-called darshan Tours.
I received a reply that when the time was right, I would have Baba's darshan, but he forbade me to go to Him until then.
Joseph and Darshan took action, used their network and pitched as many times as they could.
Joseph and Darshan took action, agreed to test their prototype at an event on the Babson campus during their MBA program.
